name: Potential Kazuar Activity
notes: This rule detects Kazuar activity that is a shortcut creation and a sub-key added under HKCU registry path.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Kazuar Registry Installation match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Kazuar Shortcut Created match
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Kazuar Registry Installation match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Kazuar Shortcut Created match
thresholds: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Kazuar Registry Installation match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Kazuar Shortcut Created match
TD_list: APPLY Potential Kazuar Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Kazuar Registry Installation match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 hour(s) after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Kazuar Shortcut Created match
RED_list: Event description: Detects ComRAT activity that is a powershell loader to create scheduled tasks.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
